zh.lifeSummary: 當Mabelle De Folville於1356年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 福爾維爾時，她的父親Geoffrey de Folville36歲，母親Isabel Tilney27歲。她於1375年之前與John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1409年之後在英國萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mabelle De Folville于1356年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 福爾維爾时，她的父亲Geoffrey de Folville36岁，母亲Isabel Tilney27岁。她于1375年之前与John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1409年之后在英国萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Folville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Colleville in Seine-Maritime, France, named with the Scandinavian personal name Koli (see Cole 2) + Old French ville ‘settlement, village’. The Scottish branch of the family were descended from Philip de Colville, who came to Scotland as a household knight of kings Malcolm IV (1153–65) and William ‘the Lion’ (1165–1214).

variants.name: Cole
meanings: English: usually from the Middle English and Old French personal name Col(e), Coll(e), Coul(e), a pet form of Nicol (see Nichol and Nicholas ), a common personal name from the mid 13th century onward. English families with this name migrated to Scotland and to Ulster (especially Fermanagh).

English: occasionally perhaps from a different (early) Middle English personal name Col, of native English or Scandinavian origin. Old English Cola was originally a nickname from Old English col ‘coal’ in the sense ‘coal-black (of hair), swarthy’ and is the probable source of most of the examples in Domesday Book. In the northern and eastern counties of England settled by Vikings in the 10th and 11th centuries, alternative sources are Old Norse Kolr and Koli (either from a nickname ‘the swarthy one’ or a short form of names in Kol-), and Old Norse Kollr (from a nickname, perhaps ‘the bald one’).
English: nickname for someone with swarthy skin or black hair, from Middle English col, coul(e) ‘charcoal, coal’ (Old English col).

variants.name: Colvin
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Donegal, Antrim): variant of   Colville  , probably reflecting a local pronunciation. The name was taken to Ulster in the 17th century.
Manx: if not identical with 1, perhaps from the Old Norse personal name Kolbeinn, with /v/ substituted for /b/.

English: from the rare Middle English personal name Colwin, Colvin, which may be a borrowing into English of a Welsh name whose modern form is Collwyn ‘white’, or of colwyn ‘doe, puppy, pet dog’, or of the placename Colwyn (Denbighshire, Radnorshire).

nameMeanings.name: Mabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Elaborated form of Mabel , under the influence of the French phrase ma belle ‘my beautiful one’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Mabelle De Folville was born in 1356, in Ashby Folville, Leicestershire, England, her father, Geoffrey de Folville, was 36 and her mother, Isabel Tilney, was 27. She married John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince before 1375, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1409, in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mabelle De Folville est née en 1356, à Ashby Folville, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey de Folville, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Isabel Tilney, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince avant 1375, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1409, à Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mabelle De Folville 1356 in Ashby Folville, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffrey de Folville 36 und ihre Mutter Isabel Tilney 27. Sie hat vor 1375 in England John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1409 in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mabelle De Folville è nata il nel 1356 nel Ashby Folville, Leicestershire, England, sua padre, Geoffrey de Folville, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Isabel Tilney, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince prima del 1375, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1409, nel Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mabelle De Folvilleが1356年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアアシュビー フォルヴィルで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Folvilleは36歳，母Isabel Tilneyは27歳であった。1375年以前にイギリスでJohn De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Princeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1409年以後にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアメルトン モウブレイで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mabelle De Folville(이)가 1356년 영국 레이스스터실르 애스h비 포빌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey de Folville(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Tilney(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1375년 이전 영국에서 John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1409년 이후 영국 레이스스터실르 멜턴 모우브라이에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mabelle De Folville nasceu em 1356, em Ashby Folville, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Geoffrey de Folville, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Tilney, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince antes 1375, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1409, em Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mabelle De Folville родилась в 1356 г. в местности ашби фолвилл, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Geoffrey de Folville было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Tilney, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince перед 1375 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1409 г. в местности мелтон мавбрэи, лисестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mabelle De Folville nació en 1356, en Ashby Folville, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Geoffrey de Folville, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Isabel Tilney, tenía 27 años. Se casó con John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince antes de 1375, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1409, en Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
